headline: Is Vulcan Materials (VMC) Quietly Recasting Its Core Story Around Federal Infrastructure And Data Centers?
summary: Vulcan Materials, the largest US construction aggregates producer, recently announced plans to release its fiscal first-quarter 2026 results and host an earnings call on April 29, following analyst expectations for a profit increase compared with the prior year. Analysts and management comments highlight anticipated demand support from public infrastructure and data center projects funded by federal programs, which could be significant for Vulcan’s aggregates volumes and pricing power.
